---
title: "Probability"
sidebar: false
---

Welcome to the website for Middlebury College's Spring 2026 MATH/STAT 310. On this website you will find the course syllabus, schedule, and assignments. The website is frequently updated during the semester, so please make a habit of refreshing the page. The icons at the top right will link to the online version of the textbook and Canvas.

## Major Announcements

-   Midterm 2 1:1 Calendly sign-up link [here](https://calendly.com/beckytang/1-1-with-prof-tang) (optional)
    -   If you'd like, we can chat about your midterm, go over some problems together, and give you a second chance to demonstrate your understanding of some of the material.

## Course Details

Instructor: Becky Tang

-   Office: WNS 214
-   Email: btang\@middlebury.edu

Meeting times: MWF 1:10-2:00pm in WNS 011

Office hours: M 2:30-4:00pm, T 3:30-4:30pm, R 11:00am-12:00pm

Shingo's TA hours: T 7:00-9:00pm (WNS 011)

[Syllabus](syllabus/stat310_syllabus.pdf) (most recent update: 02/02/26)
